g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Owner configure at setup?')
sendPrompt('What analytics does the Owner review?')

sendPrompt('How does the Coordinator schedule lessons?')
sendPrompt('What reports does the Coordinator receive?')

sendPrompt('How does a Student track their own journey?')
